title: My AI Memory Now Follows Me Across Every Tool!
summary: Walrus Memory is a cross-agent memory layer that stores encrypted user-owned context outside individual AI tools. Users can share memory between agents from different providers like Claude and Pi with fine-grained access control and revocation capabilities.
